## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive session to train GrowthX Labs on creating blog content in Webstacks' CMS](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Covered process for creating new blog posts, including adding metadata, images, conversion panels, and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Discussed image sourcing and guidelines for blog visuals](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Agreed to review initial outlines/topics to ensure alignment before full content creation](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Webstacks to provide brand voice/tone guidelines and examples to inform content style](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

## Topics

### Creating New Blog Posts

  - [Go to Template Blog Post content type to create new entry](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Add title, SEO fields, featured image](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Select category, author, publish date](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Add excerpt (100-150 chars) and body copy in rich text field](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Can embed images, links, conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Images and Visuals

  - [Currently using illustrations, looking to incorporate more photography](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [For header images, stock photos or screenshots can work depending on topic](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [GrowthX can propose images, Webstacks can also provide existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Exploring AI image generation tools like Midjourney](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Content Workflow

  - [GrowthX generating \~10 articles/week, can share topics/outlines ahead of time](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Initial batch of outlines to be reviewed by Webstacks for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Ongoing cadence (weekly/monthly) for topic sharing TBD](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Webstacks OK with GrowthX publishing directly, then making revisions](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Webstacks to share brand voice/tone guidelines and content examples](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [GrowthX to review guidelines and propose initial batch of topics/outlines](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Discuss preferred cadence for ongoing topic sharing/approval](https://fathom.video/share/aWuMyi2nRbv92ihbpnNDsxCETS9q4sQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
